title: ModifyJS
description: A simple KubeJS addon to address some detail requirements.
body: ### TODE LIST - [√] Currently only the support for item renderByItem has been added - [√] Add an Item type that can be used to create [MEK Module Item](https://wiki.aidancbrady.com/wiki/Modules) - [x] ...(still being improved) ### Attention This mod overrides the createObject method of BlockItemBuilder, which may cause issues during block registration.
